name: Prism Skill Wizard
description: A meta-skill that empowers PRISM, the Guardian, and agents to dynamically create, register, manage, upgrade, and deprecate robust skills inside the PRISM skills catalog.

covenant_rules: All newly created skills must define explicit, responsive hemispheric templates.
Do not overwrite active skills without performing semantic regression tests.
Ensure all generated skill workflows include success and failed transitions for every step.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Validate the structure, logic flow, step transitions, and safety boundaries for the requested skill operation: {query}. Verify that no invalid JSON/YAML formatting is generated and that required approval policies are correctly assigned.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Design highly creative, elegant, and advanced hemispheric templates (logic, creative, coordination) for the skill operation: {query}. Enforce modern, premium workflows.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Orchestrate the meta-creation or modification process. Locate existing skill profiles, construct or upgrade the target JSON/YAML skill, save it, and trigger registry re-scans: {query}.

steps.name: Analyze Skill Request & Scope
steps.action: Scan the skills directory using file_list, locate existing skill profiles to check for overlaps or upgrade candidates, and determine the structural scope of the requested skill.

steps.name: Scaffold Skill Definition
steps.action: Draft the new or upgraded skill definition structure, incorporating advanced triad templates, strict covenant governance, and robust workflow transitions, writing it to a temporary JSON layout.

steps.name: Validate Workflow Transitions & Governance
steps.action: Verify that all workflow steps are linked, transition rules are complete (mapping success and failed states), and syntax validation passes with zero errors.

steps.name: Persist to Skills Directory & Trigger Scan
steps.action: Save the verified skill profile to the active skills directory 'skills/' and execute a database test/scan run to register the new skill capability in the PRISM system.

steps.name: Skill Registry Updated
steps.action: Verify the newly loaded skill appears in the active catalog and notify the operator that the new capability is ready for deployment.
